race.description: Vale David Clements & Rob Wood Maiden Hurdle
race.comment: Another maiden hurdle will be run over 3200m for 50K, and we like JABBAWOCKEEZ (3), who makes his jumping debut off the back of a recent jumping trial win. He is a toff in the wet, and is sure to be well educated from the Tom Dabernig stable. Follow that money trail. SUNDAY BUZZ (6) is trained on the course, makes his debut in this role, and was a game third on the flat 12 days ago at Kyneton. He will be ready to run a big race. MR WATERVILLE (4) has won trials over the jumps, and though he was no great shakes in Australia on the flat, you can bet he will improve in this role. Check the market moves. THE VOCALIST (7) has already had a run over the jumps earlier in his career, and he will be having his second run this prep, but has been trialling up nicely over the jumps. A wet track is a query for us, but we still put him in combos. ANDY WIN (1) has the form and is in the right stable. Hard to beat.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial - Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible
